title: Water Can Boil and Freeze at the Same Time
description: Explain the triple point of water (~273.16 K at ~611.657 Pa): solid, liquid, and gas in equilibrium. Educational physics — not a kitchen trick claim. Ground in standard thermodynamics / NIST-style physical constants education. Avoid implying everyday conditions achieve this without vacuum apparatus.
cta: Hit that like button and follow for more!
